title: Vanguards of Healthcare: Ocular Therapeutix Cuts Blindness Toll
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：眼科疗法减少失明人数
summary: “Forty percent of patients in this country alone in the first year drop out [of current retinal disease treatments] and every one of those patients ends up going blind. By far the most expensive disease in the world is blindness and the reason for that is really quite simple. It’s because the mortality doesn’t change, the use of resources skyrockets, but the mortality doesn’t change. In this country, every blind patient costs over $66,000 a year,” says Pravin Dugel, CEO of Ocular Therapeutix. “I

title: Wind Power Expands as Competition Heats Up (Podcast)
title_cn: 随着竞争的加剧，风力发电规模不断扩大（播客）
summary: The wind industry is entering a new phase of scale. Offshore installations are set to surge in 2026 as a new generation of massive projects comes online, while onshore markets continue expanding across the globe. But the picture beneath those headline numbers is increasingly nuanced. Offshore developers are still grappling with supply chain bottlenecks, higher financing costs and policy uncertainty, even as governments accelerate deployment in the name of energy security and rising power demand.

Even with the backing of the billionaire Ellison family, this will be a major test of debt investors’ willingness to support megamergers.

summary: The US struck Iranian military targets for the second time this week, shooting down four Iranian drones fired at a commercial ship and hitting a launch unit near the Strait of Hormuz, according to a US official. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 研究发现英国可能无法实现住房目标 40% 或更多
summary: The UK could miss its goal of adding 1.5 million new homes in the current parliamentary term by at least 40%, according to a report by Bloomberg Intelligence that urges the government to ramp up efforts to stimulate demand and help developers.

Tropin speaks with Bloomberg reporter Hema Parmar at the Hedge Fund and Alternative Manager Forum.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea’s Pension Fund Raises Domestic Stock Target as Kospi Soars

summary: South Korea’s giant pension fund sharply ramped up its allocation target for domestic equities, a move that may help it avoid forced sales of Kospi shares after the recent rally pushed its holdings above the limit.

title: Iran War: US Strikes Targets Near Hormuz With No Deal in Sight | The Opening Trade 5/28/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：美国袭击霍尔木兹附近的目标，但没有达成任何协议开盘交易 5/28/2026
summary:
Stocks fell while oil and bond yields climbed after fresh attacks in the Middle East fueled doubts over whether an end to the war is imminent.

S&P 500 futures slipped 0.2%, pointing to the benchmark’s first decline in more than a week. Brent rose 2.9% toward $97 a barrel after the US carried out airstrikes on an Iranian military site, clouding hopes for a diplomatic breakthrough.

The latest upheaval between the US and Iran shows the fragility of the ceasefire and the push for a deal that traders have long seen as only a matter of time. The Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation gauge expected to climb closer to 4% in data due Thursday.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Joumanna Bercetche and Tom Mackenzie.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Retail Revival Adds Fuel to US Stocks, JPMorgan Strategists Say
title_cn: 摩根大通策略师表示，零售业复苏为美国股市注入动力
summary: Retail investors’ share of US equity trading is poised to rebound after falling to a four-year low by the end of the first quarter, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co. strategists, potentially providing a fresh tailwind for stocks.

title: Drone Makers Quantum and Destinus Seek Banks for 2027 IPOs
title_cn: 无人机制造商 Quantum 和 Destinus 寻求银行进行 2027 年 IPO
summary: Quantum Systems and Destinus are in talks to line up advisers for potential IPOs as soon as early 2027, people familiar with the matter said, as the drone makers seek to tap surging demand for unmanned defense assets.

title: Protestas en Bolivia desploman sus bonos soberanos y amenazan con caos

summary: Bolivia vuelve a encender las alarmas. Las protestas y bloqueos ya afectan el abastecimiento en La Paz y desploman su imagen internacional, mientras crece la presión sobre el presidente Rodrigo Paz apenas meses después de asumir el poder.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China AI Upstart MiniMax Doubles Sales Ahead of New Model
title_cn: 中国人工智能新贵MiniMax推出新型号后销量翻倍
summary: MiniMax Group Inc.’s annualized revenue more than doubled over the past two months to at least $300 million, as the Chinese AI upstart prepares to roll out its next flagship model to entice developers and enterprise clients.

title: Markets ‘Too Complacent’ Around Impact of Inflation, PGIM’s Peters Says
title_cn: PGIM 的彼得斯表示，市场对通胀的影响“过于自满”
summary: Gregory Peters, co-chief investment officer at PGIM Credit, says he sees "shock, after shock, after shock" in markets. "That leads to higher inflation," Peters says, adding this has an impact on central banks' interest-rate positioning. He speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Prices Swing as Gulf Strikes Dampen Iran Deal Optimism

summary: Copper swung between gains and losses in a mixed session for metals, after the US carried out fresh strikes in the Persian Gulf and a deal to end the war with Iran remained elusive.

title_cn: 中国部长再次缺席赫格斯出席的防务论坛
summary: China’s top military diplomat will skip Asia’s biggest defense forum for a second year in a row, ceding to the US and its allies an opportunity for public defense diplomacy.

title_cn: 德国、西班牙抵制欧洲禁止华为设备的计划
summary: Germany and Spain are leading opposition to European Commission plans to ban Chinese technology suppliers from telecom networks as part of new cybersecurity rules, according to people familiar with the negotiations.

summary: The iPhone maker looks to stage a comeback in digital assistants and artificial intelligence.

summary: Oura Health Oy, the popular smart ring maker seeking to go public this year, unveiled a significantly thinner and lighter new model along with new wellness features.

title: Architect Set to Launch US-Listed Compute Futures in Challenge to CME, NYSE-owner
title_cn: 架构师将推出在美国上市的计算期货，挑战纽约证券交易所所有者 CME
summary: Architect Financial Technologies, an offshore derivatives exchange operator, has bought a US-regulated trading venue as it seeks to launch a futures market in computing power and other artificial intelligence commodities.

title: Boston Seizes on California Billionaire Tax to Lure AI Talent
title_cn: 波士顿利用加州亿万富翁税吸引人工智能人才
summary: The talent at some of America’s hottest artificial intelligence companies often passes through Boston-area universities before heading west to build billion-dollar businesses in Silicon Valley. Massachusetts business and political leaders say California’s proposed tax on billionaires is an opportunity to change that.

title: Caesars Agrees to Be Taken Over by Fertitta in $5.7 Billion Deal
title_cn: Caesars 同意由 Fertitta 以 57 亿美元的交易收购
summary: Caesars Entertainment Inc. has agreed to be bought by Fertitta Entertainment Inc. in a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal that stands to form a massive entertainment empire in the US.

title: Snowflake Had Seminal Quarter for Software, Dan Ives Says
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 表示，Snowflake 在软件领域具有开创性的意义
summary: Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, examines second-quarter earnings from Snowflake and the pressure he sees on Salesforce to monetize 15% to 20% of their customer base over the next “two, three, four quarters.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Eyes AI Subscriptions While AI Rivals Target Meta’s Ad Business
title_cn: Meta 着眼于 AI 订阅，而 AI 竞争对手则瞄准 Meta 的广告业务
summary: The social giant wants to make money from its chatbot, but its core business may be at risk.

title: Universal’s First Kid-Focused Theme Park to Open in Texas on July 1
title_cn: 环球影城首个以儿童为中心的主题公园将于 7 月 1 日在德克萨斯州开业
summary: Comcast Corp.’s Universal division will open its first theme park aimed specifically at young children this summer in an effort to reach a demographic that may be overwhelmed by some of the attractions at its bigger parks.

title: Temu Fined €200 Million by EU Over Dangerous Toys, Chargers
title_cn: Temu 因危险玩具、充电器被欧盟罚款 2 亿欧元
summary: Temu, the Chinese e-commerce giant, was fined €200 million ($232 million) by the European Union for failing to stop sales of unsafe baby toys and chargers on the platform.

title: The AI Boom Is Warping the San Francisco Property Market
title_cn: 人工智能热潮正在改变旧金山房地产市场
summary: Ordinary renters are getting squeezed out.

title: JD.com’s €2.2 Billion Ceconomy Deal Hit by EU Subsidy Probe
title_cn: 京东 22 亿欧元的 Ceconomy 交易遭遇欧盟补贴调查
summary: Chinese e-commerce firm JD.com Inc.’s offer to acquire Germany’s Ceconomy AG has been hit by an in-depth probe by European Union watchdogs, throwing the €2.2 billion ($2.6 billion) deal for the bloc’s largest consumer electronics retailer into doubt.

title: Snowflake Jumps 39% on Sales Outlook, $6 Billion Amazon Deal
title_cn: Snowflake 销售额增长 39%，与亚马逊达成 60 亿美元交易
summary: Snowflake Inc. shares jumped about 39% in premarket trading after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon.com Inc.’s cloud services and chips.

title: Mistral Signs Airbus, BMW as It Brings AI to Manufacturing
title_cn: 米斯特拉尔签约空客和宝马，将人工智能引入制造业
summary: French artificial intelligence startup Mistral AI is expanding into advanced manufacturing, striking deals with new customers Airbus SE and BMW AG as it looks to so-called physical AI to fuel growth.

title: Taiwan Suspects Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China Via Japan
title_cn: 台湾怀疑英伟达芯片经日本走私至中国
summary: Taiwan prosecutors suspect that three individuals successfully smuggled at least one shipment of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China after first exporting them to Japan, people familiar with the matter said.

title: The DOJ Wants to Know Who on Reddit and X Is Criticizing ICE's Tactics
title_cn: DOJ 想知道 Reddit 和 X 上谁批评 ICE 的策略
summary: In seeking identities of those behind anonymous social media posts, the Trump administration is intensifying its pursuit using grand jury subpoenas.

title: Hedge Funds Control More Than Half of Electronic Gilts Trading
title_cn: 对冲基金控制着一半以上的电子金边债券交易
summary: Hedge funds now control more than half of the electronically traded gilts market, Tradeweb data show, a shift that could be making UK government debt more vulnerable to bursts of volatility.

title: Emerging Stock Rally Stalls After Setback to Iran Accord Hopes
title_cn: 伊朗协议希望受挫后新兴股市涨势陷入停滞
summary: Emerging-market stocks snapped a week-long rally and most currencies weakened as renewed strikes on Iran dashed hopes of a swift resolution to the war.

title: Russia Plans to Launch Crewed Spacecraft From Baikonur in July
title_cn: 俄罗斯计划七月从拜科努尔发射载人航天器
summary: Russia plans its first launch of a manned space mission from the Baikonur launch site this year with a crew that includes a NASA astronaut.

title: Salesforce's Lukewarm Outlook Fuels AI Disruption Fear
title_cn: Salesforce 的冷淡前景加剧了对人工智能颠覆的恐惧
summary: Salesforce gave a revenue outlook for the current period that fell just short of analysts’ estimates. Revenue will be about $11.3 billion in the fiscal second quarter, which ends in July, Salesforce said Wednesday. The leading maker of customer management software is under pressure to show it can thrive in the AI era. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mistral Signs with Airbus and BMW as it Expands Into Physical AI
title_cn: 米斯特拉尔与空客和宝马签约，进军物理人工智能领域
summary: Description: French artificial intelligence startup Mistral AI is expanding into advanced manufacturing, striking deals with new customers Airbus and BMW as it looks to so-called physical AI to fuel growth. Mistral is also announcing a new data centre in France. The CEO and co-founder Arthur Mensch spoke with Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie from Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Server Maker Wiwynn Sees AI Bottlenecks Beyond Memory
title_cn: Nvidia 服务器制造商 Wiwynn 发现内存之外的 AI 瓶颈
summary: Wiwynn Corp., one of the biggest makers of Nvidia Corp. servers, warned of shortages developing in vital data center components beyond just memory chips, potentially slowing or inflating the cost of a global AI infrastructure buildout.

title: AtlasEdge Gets €1.2 Billion in Loans for European Data Centers
title_cn: AtlasEdge 获得欧洲数据中心 12 亿欧元贷款
summary: A data center operator backed by Liberty Global and DigitalBridge Group Inc. secured more than €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion) in financing to roll out artificial intelligence infrastructure in under-served parts of Europe.

title: French Power Demand Rises as Deadly Heat Wave Intensifies
title_cn: 随着致命热浪加剧，法国电力需求上升
summary: The deadly heat wave gripping northwest Europe is set to intensify in Spain and France, lifting power demand for cooling and threatening fresh temperature records.

title: For International Fintechs, America Is the Grand Prize
title_cn: 对于国际金融科技公司来说，美国是大奖
summary: Revolut, Nubank and Wise are among the overseas firms competing for consumers’ dollars in the world’s biggest market.

title: Taiwan Stock Exchange Plans Longer Trading Hours, Odd-Lot Reform
title_cn: 台湾证券交易所计划延长交易时间及碎股改革
summary: The Taiwan Stock Exchange is working on improving a key trading system popular among retail investors and planning longer trading hours to attract more demand, the bourse’s chairman said.

title: UK’s Biggest Utility Set to Miss Its 2030 Green Power Target
title_cn: 英国最大的公用事业公司将无法实现 2030 年绿色电力目标
summary: SSE Plc said it is unlikely to meet its 2030 renewable energy target, citing a difficult market environment, policy uncertainty and delays to grid connections.

title: JD.com Founder Vows to Protect Chinese Jobs From AI and Robots
title_cn: 京东创始人誓言保护中国就业机会免受人工智能和机器人的侵害
summary: JD.com Inc. founder Liu Qiangdong vowed to prevent the e-commerce firm’s 900,000-strong workforce from losing their jobs to automation, seeking to allay growing fears that the adoption of AI and robotics could replace workers.

title: Iran, US Accuse Each Other of Truce Breach With No Deal in Sight
title_cn: 伊朗和美国互相指责对方违反停战协议，但尚未达成任何协议
summary: Iran and the US accused each other of violating a fragile ceasefire in their three-month war, after Washington struck Iranian military targets for the second time this week.

title: California ‘Class Traitor’ Tom Steyer Wants to Tax His Fellow Billionaires
title_cn: 加州“阶级叛徒”汤姆·斯泰尔想要向他的亿万富翁同胞征税
summary: The former hedge fund titan is waging one of the most expensive gubernatorial campaigns in US history — on a platform the business community hates.

title: Sweden to Sell, Donate Saab Jets to Ukraine to Aid Defense
title_cn: 瑞典将向乌克兰出售、捐赠萨博喷气式飞机以援助国防
summary: Sweden said it will sell 20 of the latest model Saab Gripen fighter jets to Ukraine and donate 16 older versions of the aircraft to support Kyiv’s fight against the Russian invasion.

title: Singapore’s Top Envoy Meets Kim Jong Un’s Close Aide on Rare Trip
title_cn: 新加坡高级特使罕见访问金正恩亲密助手
summary: Singapore’s foreign minister held talks with a top aide to North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in a rare visit to Pyongyang, urging the isolated state to keep channels for dialogue open with the outside world.

title: Talarico Gets $3 Million in One Day as Texas to Become Money Pit
title_cn: 德克萨斯州沦为金钱坑，塔拉里科一日赚 300 万美元
summary: As Donald Trump celebrated Ken Paxton’s landslide win in Texas, Republican officials were busy gearing up for a brutal fight that may end up costing them more than $100 million to stop a Democrat from flipping a seat in a state the president won by 14 percentage points.

title: Hungary Is ‘Very Close’ to EU Funding Deal, Premier Magyar Says
title_cn: 匈牙利总理马扎尔表示，匈牙利“非常接近”达成欧盟资助协议
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said his government is “very close” to a deal with the European Union that would open the way for the release of billions of euros in suspended aid and ease the pressure on the cash-strapped budget.

title: Russia and Kazakhstan Sign Energy, FX Swap Deals as Putin Visits
title_cn: 普京访问期间俄罗斯和哈萨克斯坦签署能源、外汇互换协议
summary: Russia and Kazakhstan signed a series of deals during a visit by President Vladimir Putin, including a currency swap arrangement and an agreement on financing for the construction of the Central Asian nation’s first nuclear power plant.

title: Trump Grapples With Supreme Court as Major Cases Loom
title_cn: 随着重大案件的临近，特朗普与最高法院展开斗争
summary: Outstanding decisions are set to track the limits of the president’s power

title: US Strikes Iran Targets, Oil Gains With No Accord in Sight
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗目标，石油价格上涨但看不到任何协议
summary: Renewed US attacks on Iran targets near the Strait of Hormuz threaten a fragile ceasefire. Oil climbed as traders wait for signs of whether the US and Iran can reach a peace deal that would reopen the critical waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marcos and Takaichi Agree on Talks Toward Military Info Sharing
title_cn: 马科斯和高市就军事信息共享谈判达成一致
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi agreed to start talks toward a deal that would facilitate military information-sharing, as shared concerns over an increasingly assertive China accelerate a deepening of security ties between the two Asian nations.

title: Merz Aims to Halt Party Unrest With Vow to Revive Germany
title_cn: 梅尔茨致力于制止党派骚乱，誓言复兴德国
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz brushed aside talk that his plummeting popularity could prompt a bid to replace him as head Germany’s government as he vowed to press ahead with a reform agenda.

title: Norway Joins Macron’s Push to Shield Europe With French Nukes
title_cn: 挪威加入马克龙的行列，利用法国核武器保护欧洲
summary: Norway became the ninth country to join French President Emmanuel Macron’s initiative to spread France’s nuclear deterrence across more of Europe.

title: Hezbollah Turns the Tables as Iran Talks Creak
title_cn: 伊朗谈判破裂，真主党扭转局势
summary: Israel, having largely focused its offensive on southern Lebanon, is again sending warplanes inland.

title: Philippine Senator Charged Over ‘Illicit Payouts’ in Flood Mess
title_cn: 菲律宾参议员被控在洪水混乱中“非法支付”
summary: The Philippines’ anti-graft watchdog charged Senator Jinggoy Estrada with plunder and graft for allegedly receiving millions of pesos in an infrastructure corruption scheme that slowed economic growth and outraged the public.

title: India, China Pursue Border Cooperation Talks Amid Thaw in Ties
title_cn: 印度和中国在关系解冻之际寻求边境合作谈判
summary: China and India discussed marking out the disputed border and trans-border rivers, key sticking points in ties, in the latest sign that the neighbors are continuing their efforts to stabilize relations.

title: Meloni Pushes Italian Electoral Reform Ahead of 2027 Election
title_cn: 梅洛尼在 2027 年大选前推动意大利选举改革
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni’s government submitted a proposal to reform Italy’s electoral law in a bid to improve the premier’s chances in the 2027 general election.

title: South African Legislature Seeks Legal Advice on Ramaphosa Probe
title_cn: 南非立法机构就拉马福萨调查寻求法律建议
summary: South Africa’s parliamentary speaker is seeking legal advice on whether the legislature should proceed with an impeachment inquiry into President Cyril Ramaphosa over his handling of a robbery at his game farm, after he filed a lawsuit seeking to halt the process.

title: Milei Approval Rises From Lowest Point as Inflation Worries Ease
title_cn: 随着通胀担忧缓解，Milei 的支持率从最低点上升
summary: President Javier Milei clawed back some ground with Argentine voters as adversaries lost favor and inflation slowed, although his popularity remains near the lowest levels of his term.

title: Corruption Concerns in Mexico Hit High Under Sheinbaum
title_cn: 谢因鲍姆领导下墨西哥的腐败问题加剧
summary: Mexicans’ concern about corruption is at the highest level of Claudia Sheinbaum’s presidency, as US accusations against a governor add to scandals hitting high-ranking figures and institutions.

title: China Says It Drove Off Dutch Warship Sailing in South China Sea
title_cn: 中国称其击退了在南海航行的荷兰军舰
summary: China said it expelled a Dutch warship that entered its waters, a rare incident between the two navies that underscores tensions over contested boundaries in the South China Sea.

title: Kenya, US Are in Ebola Cooperation Talks After Quarantine Report
title_cn: 检疫报告后肯尼亚与美国正在进行埃博拉合作谈判
summary: Kenya is in talks with the US on Ebola-related health cooperation after media reports that the Trump administration is planning to send Americans exposed to the virus to a quarantine facility in the East African nation being built by the US military.

title: Ghanaians Evacuated from South Africa Amid Anti-Immigrant Tumult
title_cn: 在反移民骚乱中加纳人从南非撤离
summary: The Ghanaian government repatriated 295 of its citizens from South Africa on Wednesday amid an ongoing wave of anti-immigrant protests in Africa’s largest economy.

title: EU Warns of Russian Trap Over Reopening Talks With the Kremlin
title_cn: 欧盟警告俄罗斯与克里姆林宫重启谈判可能落入陷阱
summary: The European Union risks walking into a Russian trap by discussing the possible appointment of a special envoy to negotiate with President Vladimir Putin, the bloc’s top diplomat said.

title: Nigerian Opposition Leader Set for Seventh Presidential Run
title_cn: 尼日利亚反对派领袖将第七次竞选总统
summary: Nigeria’s main opposition party picked Atiku Abubakar as its flagbearer in January’s presidential elections, setting up a rematch of his 2023 contest with incumbent leader Bola Tinubu.

title: Lagarde Says Central-Bank Credibility Is Key in New World Order
title_cn: 拉加德表示央行信誉是新世界秩序的关键
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said that governments might be inclined to tighten their grip on monetary authorities and stressed that upholding central-bank independence is even more important in an increasingly challenging global order.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets Near Hormuz With No Accord in Sight
title_cn: 美国袭击霍尔木兹附近的伊朗目标，但没有达成任何协议
summary: The US struck Iranian military targets for the second time this week and Kuwait said it responded to missile and drone threats, highlighting the fragility of the ceasefire and the challenge of forging a peace accord that would restore global energy flows.

title: Iran War: US Launches Strikes as Trump Rejects Easing Sanctions | Daybreak Europe 05/28/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普拒绝放松制裁，美国发动打击欧洲黎明 05/28/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Stocks and bonds fell while oil climbed after the US carried out airstrikes on an Iranian military site and imposed new sanctions to prevent Tehran from profiting from vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting the fragility of recent diplomatic momentum.

Salesforce gave a revenue outlook for the current period that fell just short of analysts’ estimates, unnerving investors already concerned about the possibility that artificial intelligence will disrupt the software business.

Today's guest: Trevor Charsley, Corpay, Senior Technical Strategist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Files Fresh $10 Billion Suit Over WSJ’s Epstein Story
title_cn: 特朗普因《华尔街日报》报道爱泼斯坦的故事提起新的 100 亿美元诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump filed a new version of his $10 billion libel lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal and its parent company News Corp. over an article about his alleged close ties to Jeffrey Epstein, after an earlier version of the suit was tossed out by a judge.
